hypotheses.evidence: consistency survives full hub removal (0 contradictions); the hub mediates 96% of REQUIRES but is not required for consistency
no consistency core exists; every subset down to 10% of ayahs is fully consistent
removing any SCC creates 0 contradictions; no SCC is self-negating (max created 0)
removing any motif's concepts creates 0 contradictions (max created 0)
consistency holds independently in both halves of every random split; it is a per-pair local property, not a duplicated mechanism
shuffled null matrices are equally consistent (null contradictions 0.0 max over 30 runs) — consistency is generic, not specially emergent
hypotheses.hypothesis: consistency is emergent (special to this structure)

hypotheses.evidence: consistency survives every structural removal and every null shuffle; it is destroyed ONLY by direct data corruption (injecting positive edges into exclusion pairs). It is partly tautological (co=0 vs co≥5 are mutually exclusive) and partly generic (hub-dominated sparse co-occurrence). It is not carried by any removable structure
hypotheses.hypothesis: consistency is irreducible (a property of the matrix's internal coherence + the contradiction definitions)

verdict: only H7 survives: consistency is IRREDUCIBLE — not maintained by hub, core, SCCs, motifs, or redundancy, and not specially emergent. It is a property of the activation matrix's internal coherence, destroyable only by corrupting the data itself
